product_overview: YOMU is a web-based school digital library that lets students discover, borrow, favorite, and review books while providing admins tools to manage collections, loans, users, and reports with role-based access control.
core_goals: Enable students to discover, request, borrow, return, and review books via an intuitive responsive UI
Provide administrators full CRUD control over books, categories, users, and loan workflows with reporting and export capabilities
Enforce secure JWT-based authentication and role-based routing (ADMIN vs SISWA) across frontend and API
Surface actionable library metrics and automate overdue detection & notification workflows

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow users to authenticate with email and password and redirect to role-specific dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button to submit -> See /siswa (for SISWA) or /admin (for ADMIN) dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Click forgot password link -> Navigate to /forgot-password
Navigate to /login -> Click register link -> Navigate to /register

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register a new student account with profile details (name, email, class, major, password).
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill full name input field -> Fill email input field -> Select class from dropdown -> Select major from dropdown -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field -> Click register button to submit -> See success confirmation and redirect to /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with an already-registered email -> Fill required fields -> Click register button to submit -> See validation errors (email already taken)

Navigate to /register -> Fill password input field -> Toggle password visibility -> Fill confirm password field mismatching password -> Click register button to submit -> See validation errors (passwords do not match)

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset email using registered email address.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field -> Click submit button -> See success message indicating reset email sent
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field with unknown email -> Click submit button -> See error message (email not found)

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Set a new password using the token from the password reset email.
user_flows: Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field -> Click submit button -> See success message and redirect to /login
Navigate to /reset-password with expired or invalid token -> Fill password input field -> Click submit button -> See error message indicating invalid or expired token

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student home page showing personal stats, recommendations, and quick navigation to catalog and loans.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa -> See dashboard statistics -> View recommended books list -> Click a recommended book card to view detail
Navigate to /siswa as unauthenticated user -> Middleware blocks access -> Redirect to /login

features.name: Book Catalog
features.description: Browse, search, filter, and paginate through available books.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/katalog -> Search books by title -> See filtered results -> Click on a book card to view detail -> Navigate to /siswa/detail
Navigate to /siswa/katalog -> Filter by category -> See filtered results -> Browse through pagination
Navigate to /siswa/katalog -> Search with query that returns no matches -> See 'no books found' message

features.name: Book Detail and Borrowing
features.description: View detailed book information, read reviews, add to favorites, submit borrow requests, and write reviews.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/katalog -> Click on book card to view detail -> Navigate to /siswa/detail -> View book information -> Read reviews and ratings -> Click Submit a borrow request -> See borrow request confirmation (loan created with PENDING status)
Navigate to /siswa/katalog -> Click on book card to view detail -> Navigate to /siswa/detail -> Click Add to favorites -> See book added to favorites list
Navigate to /siswa/detail -> Click Submit a borrow request when book has zero availableStock -> See error message indicating book unavailable

features.name: Student Loan Management
features.description: Students view and manage their active and historical loans and request returns.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/peminjaman -> View list of active loans -> Click a loan to view loan details -> Click Request return of a book -> See loan status update to RETURNING (request submitted)
Navigate to /siswa/peminjaman -> Filter loans by status -> See filtered loan list
Navigate to /siswa/peminjaman -> Click Request return for a loan already in RETURNING state -> See error message (cannot request return again)

features.name: Student Favorites
features.description: View and manage the student's list of favorite/wishlisted books.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/favorit -> View list of favorite books -> Click on a favorite book to view detail -> Navigate to /siswa/detail
Navigate to /siswa/favorit -> Click Remove a book from favorites -> See book removed from list
Navigate to /siswa/favorit when favorites list is empty -> See empty state message ('no favorites yet')

features.name: Student Messaging
features.description: Chat with admins using a WhatsApp-style conversation UI for support and notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/pesan -> View conversations list -> Click a conversation to open messages -> Send a message -> See message appear in chat
Navigate to /siswa/pesan -> Click to start a new conversation -> Send a message -> See conversation created and listed
Navigate to /siswa/pesan -> Attempt to send an empty message -> See validation error preventing send

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview with key metrics, pending loan requests, and overdue items.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See dashboard statistics -> View pending loan requests list -> Click a pending loan to inspect details
Navigate to /admin as non-admin user -> Middleware blocks access -> Redirect to /login or 'access denied' page

features.name: Admin Book Management
features.description: Admin CRUD for books: list, search, add, edit, and delete books with stock tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/buku -> View list of all books -> Click Add a new book -> Fill book form fields -> Click Add -> See newly created book in list
Navigate to /admin/buku -> Click on a book to edit -> Edit book details -> Click Save -> See updated book details in list
Navigate to /admin/buku -> Click Delete on a book -> Confirm deletion in modal -> See book removed from list
Navigate to /admin/buku -> Click Add a new book -> Submit with missing required fields -> See validation errors

features.name: Admin Category Management
features.description: Create, edit, and delete book categories used for filtering and organization.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/kategori -> View list of categories -> Click Add a new category -> Fill category name and details -> Click Save -> See new category in list
Navigate to /admin/kategori -> Click Edit on a category -> Change name -> Click Save -> See updated category
Navigate to /admin/kategori -> Click Delete on a category that is referenced by books -> See error or warning preventing deletion

features.name: Admin Member Management
features.description: Manage library users: view, add, edit, toggle active status, and delete members.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/anggota -> View list of members -> Search members by name or email -> Click Edit on a member -> Update details -> Click Save -> See updated member in list
Navigate to /admin/anggota -> Click Toggle member active status -> See member status change reflected in list
Navigate to /admin/anggota -> Click Delete on a member -> Confirm deletion -> See member removed from list

features.name: Admin Loan Management
features.description: Approve/reject loan requests, verify returns, and mark damaged books within the loan lifecycle.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/peminjaman -> View all loans with status tabs -> Click on a pending loan request -> Click Approve a loan request -> See loan status updated to APPROVED
Navigate to /admin/peminjaman -> Click on a pending loan request -> Click Reject a loan request -> Provide rejection reason -> See loan status updated to REJECTED
Navigate to /admin/peminjaman -> Click on a returned loan -> Click Verify a book return -> Mark as RETURNED -> See loan status updated to RETURNED
Navigate to /admin/peminjaman -> Attempt to approve a loan already APPROVED -> See error indicating invalid action

features.name: Admin Reports
features.description: Generate and export library reports: loan summaries, popular books, active members, and PDF/CSV exports.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/laporan -> View loan statistics summary -> Filter reports by date range -> View popular books chart -> Click Export reports to PDF -> Receive PDF download
Navigate to /admin/laporan -> Filter with invalid date range (end before start) -> See validation error or empty results

features.name: Reviews & Ratings
features.description: Students can write one review per book with a star rating and comment; reviews are visible on the book detail page.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa/detail -> Write a review -> Submit review -> See new review appear under reviews and rating aggregated
Navigate to /siswa/detail -> Attempt to submit a second review for the same book -> See error message indicating one review per user per book

routes.description: Landing page / home page
User login page with email and password
Student registration page with name, email, class, major, password
Forgot password form to request reset email
Reset password form with token from email
Student dashboard with stats and book recommendations
Book catalog for students to browse and search books
Book detail page with borrow functionality and reviews
Student loan management - view and return borrowed books
Student favorite books list
Library rules and regulations for students
Student messaging / chat with admin
Admin dashboard with statistics and overview
Admin book management - CRUD operations for books
Admin category management - CRUD operations for categories
Admin member management - view and manage users
Admin loan management - approve/reject loans and verify returns
Admin reports page with statistics and PDF export
Admin library rules management
Admin messaging / chat with students
